overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a lush grassy meadow, crossing a shallow river, followed by an abrupt transition to a stormy ocean coastline. The sequence features overcast lighting and high-fidelity game engine graphics with detailed natural environments.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward the river, with a pistol visible on the hip

entered.detail: dense green grass and wild vegetation covering the ground
dense line of pine trees forming the horizon boundary
large gray rocky mountains with forested slopes
standing dead tree trunk without leaves
shallow river with visible current and rocks

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense grassy meadow under an overcast sky, approaching a shallow river. Tall coniferous forests line the horizon with rocky mountains rising in the background, creating a serene wilderness atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with rocky bed

events.description: character steps from grassy bank into shallow river water, creating splashes

agents.ego_description: wading through the shallow river, water rippling around the legs as the character moves steadily forward

entered.detail: smooth stones and rocks visible beneath the clear flowing water

segments.scene_description: The character enters and wades through a shallow river with a rocky bed, water splashing with each step. The surrounding grassy banks and distant mountains remain visible as the camera follows the crossing from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: stormy ocean coastline with breaking waves

events.description: abrupt cut from river crossing to ocean coastal scene with no character visible

agents.ego_description: camera moves over ocean water toward rocky coastline, character no longer in frame

entered.detail: dark choppy ocean water with white foam
green forested cliffs meeting the ocean
pale rocky outcroppings in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene abruptly transitions to a stormy ocean view with waves breaking against a rocky coastline. The camera moves forward over the dark water toward forested cliffs and white rock formations under heavy overcast skies.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in a serene wilderness meadow and abruptly shifts into a stormy coastal landscape. It begins with the character walking through a dense grassy meadow under an overcast sky, with coniferous forests and rocky mountains framing the horizon. As the character continues forward, the scene transitions into a shallow river where the camera follows from behind as they wade through the splashing water and rocky bed. The environment then shifts suddenly from the riverbanks to a dark, stormy ocean where waves break violently against a rocky coastline. The camera finally moves forward over the churning water toward forested cliffs and white rock formations under heavy, oppressive skies.
